dis_application_view.llm_summary: Amina Okafor is a NG national applying for Skilled Worker permission sponsored by UNION FAST FOODS LIMITED for Biochemists and biomedical scientists (SOC 2113). The application states salary £57,300 against the SOC going rate £45,900 and start date 2026-07-01. The corpus evidence supports approval: identity, sponsorship, English language, maintenance, TB where required, criminality, and immigration compliance checks are all satisfactory.
